languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "If my physiognomy offends you, there is no need to hide it behind feigned interest. However, I will answer on the hypothesis that your question is sincere. My face looks as it does because that is how I prefer it. A vox-grille is practical, but there is something about speaking my thoughts aloud via an organic vocal apparatus. Consider it my little extravagance. Besides, appearances are deceiving — my internals have been extensively augmented, and I am fully fluent in Lingua-Technis and binharic."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн улыбается.{/n} "Если моя физиономия вызывает у вас антипатию, вам не обязательно это прятать за обтекаемыми формулировками. Однако же я буду отвечать исходя из гипотезы, что ваш вопрос искренний. Мое лицо так выглядит, потому что таковы мои предпочтения. Вокс-решетка практична, но есть что-то в том, чтобы проговаривать мысли вслух использую органический речевой аппарат. Считайте это моей блажью. К тому же, внешность обманчива — я экстенсивно имплантирован внутри, и вполне способен изъясняться на {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Лингва Технис{/g} и бинарике".

languages.text: {n}Eogunn sonríe.{/n} «Si mi fisionomía l{mf|e|a} ofende, no necesita ocultarlo con falso interés. Sin embargo, responderé basándome en la hipótesis de que sea una pregunta sincera. Mi rostro tiene este aspecto porque así es como lo prefiero. La rejilla de voco es práctica, pero me gusta expresar mis pensamientos en voz alta mediante un aparato orgánico. Considérelo una extravagancia personal. En cualquier caso, las apariencias engañan: mis órganos están muy aumentados y hablo perfectamente tanto {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Tecnis{/g} como binario».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "If my physiognomy offends you, there is no need to hide it behind feigned interest. En cualquier caso, las apariencias engañan: mis órganos están muy aumentados y hablo perfectamente tanto {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Tecnis{/g} como binario».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡笑了笑。{/n}“如果我的外表让您不悦，您大可不必假装感兴趣来掩饰。不过，我就当您是真心想问，姑且回答吧。我的脸之所以长这样，是因为我喜欢。音阵格栅确实很实用，但用有机的发声器官道出所思所想，总有种别样的感觉。权当是我的一点任性吧。再说了，外表是会骗人的——我的体内经过了大量改造，而且我完全精通{g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}科技文{/g}和二进制。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "If my physiognomy offends you, there is no need to hide it behind feigned interest. However, I will answer on the hypothesis that your question is sincere. My face looks as it does because that is how I prefer it. A vox-grille is practical, but there is something about speaking my thoughts aloud via an organic vocal apparatus. Consider it my little extravagance. Besides, appearances are deceiving — my internals have been extensively augmented, and I am fully fluent in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g} and binharic."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡笑了笑。{/n}“如果我的外表让您不悦，您大可不必假装感兴趣来掩饰。不过，我就当您是真心想问，姑且回答吧。我的脸之所以长这样，是因为我喜欢。音阵格栅确实很实用，但用有机的发声器官道出所思所想，总有种别样的感觉。权当是我的一点任性吧。再说了，外表是会骗人的——我的体内经过了大量改造，而且我完全精通{g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}科技文{/g}和二进制。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn sourit.{/n} « Si mon apparence vous dérange, nul besoin de le cacher derrière une pseudo-inquiétude. Mais je vais toutefois répondre à votre question comme si elle était sincère. Si j'ai ce visage, c'est parce que je le préfère ainsi. Je reconnais l'aspect pratique d'une grille-vox, mais cela ne remplacera jamais le fait d'exprimer mes pensées à voix haute par le biais d'un instrument vocal organique. Considérez cela comme une petite extravagance de ma part. Et puis, les apparences sont trompeuses : mes entrailles ont bénéficié de nombreuses augmentations, et je parle couramment le {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}langage technique{/g} et le langage binhaire. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "If my physiognomy offends you, there is no need to hide it behind feigned interest. However, I will answer on the hypothesis that your question is sincere. My face looks as it does because that is how I prefer it. A vox-grille is practical, but there is something about speaking my thoughts aloud via an organic vocal apparatus. Consider it my little extravagance. Besides, appearances are deceiving — my internals have been extensively augmented, and I am fully fluent in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g} and binharic."

Je reconnais l'aspect pratique d'une grille-vox, mais cela ne remplacera jamais le fait d'exprimer mes pensées à voix haute par le biais d'un instrument vocal organique. Considérez cela comme une petite extravagance de ma part. Et puis, les apparences sont trompeuses : mes entrailles ont bénéficié de nombreuses augmentations, et je parle couramment le {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}langage technique{/g} et le langage binhaire. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn lächelt.{/n} "Falls Euch meine Physiognomie stört, müsst Ihr es nicht hinter geheucheltem Interesse verbergen. Ich werde allerdings basierend auf der Hypothese, dass Eure Frage ernst gemeint ist, antworten. Mein Gesicht sieht so aus, weil ich es so bevorzuge. Ein Vox-Gitter ist praktisch, aber es hat etwas, meine Gedanken mittels einer organischen Sprachapparatur laut auszusprechen. Betrachtet das als meine kleine Extravaganz. Abgesehen davon kann der äußere Eindruck täuschen ... mein Inneres wurde umfassend augmentiert und ich spreche fließend {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Technis{/g} und Binhärisch."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは微笑む。{/n}「私の人相が気に障るのであれば、関心を装う必要はない。しかし、あなたの質問が誠実であるという仮説のもとにお答えします。私の顔がそう見えるのは、それが私の好みだからです。ボクス・グリルは実用的だが、有機的な発声装置を介して自分の考えを声に出して話すことには何かがある。私のささやかな贅沢と考えてほしい。それに、外見はごまかしがきかないものだ。私の内部は広範囲に拡張されており、リンガ・テクニスとビンハリ語に堪能である。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn smiles.{/n} "If my physiognomy offends you, there is no need to hide it behind feigned interest. However, I will answer on the hypothesis that your question is sincere. My face looks as it does because that is how I prefer it. A vox-grille is practical, but there is something about speaking my thoughts aloud via an organic vocal apparatus. Consider it my little extravagance. Besides, appearances are deceiving — my internals have been extensively augmented, and I am fully fluent in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g} and binharic."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn gülümsüyor.{/n} "Eğer yüz ifadem sizi rahatsız ediyorsa bunu sahte bir ilginin arkasına saklamanıza gerek yok. Ancak sorunuzun samimi olduğu hipotezi üzerinden cevaplayacağım. Yüzüm böyle görünüyor çünkü ben böyle tercih ediyorum. Voks ızgarası pratiktir ama düşüncelerimi organik bir ses aygıtı aracılığıyla yüksek sesle söylemenin de bir çekiciliği var. Bunu benim ufak bir lüksüm olarak görün. Üstelik görünüş aldatıcıdır... İç organlarım kapsamlı şekilde ogmentlidir. {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Technis{/g} ile ikilidili son derece akıcı bir şekilde konuşabiliyorum."
